items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 20: Conversation 20. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• I want to drink cold milk and he wants hot milk, please.
• 7- What do you like to eat? / read / write
• Easter
• Easter is usually celebrated in April.

items.text: I want to drink cold milk and he wants hot milk, please.

items.prompt: Do you have a cat or a dog in your house?
options: I want to drink cold milk and he wants hot milk, please 3.
I want to drink cold milk and he wants hot milk, please.
You want to drink cold milk and he wants hot milk, please.
please milk, hot wants he and milk cold drink to want I.

items.text: 7- What do you like to eat? / read / write

items.prompt: 8- Do you want some cookies? / a slice of pie / a piece of cake
options: 7- What do you like to drink? / read / write
7- What do you like to eat? / read / write
7- What do you like to eat? / read / write 3.
write / read / eat? to like you do What 7-

items.answer: Easter is usually celebrated in April.
